name: AI Content Engine
description: Fully autonomous content pipeline across all 6 platforms. AI generates posts, schedules them, analyzes performance, and self-improves over time. Zero manual effort after setup.

crons.name: midnight
crons.description: Refresh analytics, clean up old assets, send nightly reports

crons.name: x-research
crons.description: Scan X/Twitter for trending hooks and competitor signals (optional — requires Bird CLI)

crons.name: self-improve-all
crons.description: Analyze performance and generate new posts for all platforms

crons.name: schedule-day
crons.description: Schedule all queued posts for today via Dropspace

crons.name: engage
crons.description: Find X/Twitter conversations to join and draft replies (optional — requires X API OAuth)

setupSteps: Get a Dropspace API key at https://dropspace.dev → Settings → API Keys
Get an Anthropic API key at https://console.anthropic.com
Get a Fal.ai API key at https://fal.ai → Keys
Edit app.json — replace all YOUR_* placeholders with your product details
Edit FORMAT.md — customize voice and per-platform rules
Edit CONTEXT.md — fill in product facts, features, and what NOT to claim
Create crons in OpenClaw with the output from setup-crons.js
Optional: set up X research with Bird CLI (see engage/ directory)
